coculture_LD.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD (mixed, periodicity)
coculture_LD.functional_description: This cluster includes 529 genes showing 24-h periodicity only in coculture under the diel light:dark (L:D) cycle. Functional enrichment is not explicitly detailed in the paper for this cluster, but it includes genes such as MIT1002_0002, MIT1002_0007, and MIT1002_0010 as examples.
coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Genes in this cluster exhibit 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture during the diel L:D cycle but do not show periodicity under extended darkness or in axenic culture conditions.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Functional enrichment not described; gene examples provided.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Descriptions of specific gene functions in this cluster are limited; periodicity pattern is clear from data.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_LD+coculture_darkness (mixed, periodicity)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.functional_description: This cluster contains 1 gene (sample MIT1002_2235) that exhibits 24-h periodicity in coculture under both diel L:D and extended darkness conditions. Specific functional enrichment or gene roles are not discussed in the paper.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.behavioral_description: The gene in this cluster maintains 24-h periodic oscillations in coculture both during the diel L:D cycle and under extended darkness, indicating sustained rhythmic expression in the presence of Alteromonas even without light.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Single gene cluster with no detailed functional annotation provided.

supporting_quotes.quote: Subsets of the Prochlorococcus transcriptome exhibited periodic oscillations under different combinations of culture conditions, including those that oscillated under all conditions.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: Single gene cluster with minimal description.

coculture_darkness.name: Alteromonas macleodii MIT1002 cluster coculture_darkness (mixed, periodicity)
coculture_darkness.functional_description: This cluster includes 1 gene (sample MIT1002_2228) showing 24-h periodicity only in coculture under extended darkness. Functional roles or enrichment are not described in the paper.
coculture_darkness.behavioral_description: The gene exhibits 24-h periodic oscillations exclusively in coculture during extended darkness, not under diel L:D or axenic conditions, suggesting heterotroph influence on maintaining periodicity in the dark.
coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Minimal functional information available; periodicity pattern noted.

supporting_quotes.quote: Other transcripts maintained periodic oscillations in different sets of culture conditions, including those that oscillated only as a function of coculture or only in extended darkness.

coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: Single gene cluster with minimal description.
